title: Bounded AI Delegated Packet Template Execution
objective: Execute the next delegated dual-lane packet after Packet 833 publication by reusing the unchanged authoritative-host helper surface for a fresh admitted-trio live evidence tuple while publishing one reusable delegated packet-definition template for later packets under explicit coordinator ownership.
dependency_note: Packet 830 remains the helper-bootstrap-toolchains-python3-path floor, Packet 831 remains the delegated split-governance floor, Packet 832 remains the delegated operator prompt template floor, and Packet 833 remains the delegated coordinator closeout template floor. This packet adds only a reusable delegated packet-definition template as the next disjoint scaffold surface.
required_inputs: The current recommendation in PROJECT_STATUS.md that later delegated packets should reuse the Packet 831 split checklist, the Packet 832 operator prompt template, and the Packet 833 coordinator closeout template with a new disjoint lane objective
The delegated ownership, validation, and abort pattern in docs/operations/OLARES-AI-DELEGATED-DUAL-LANE-EXECUTION-CHECKLIST-2026-05-13.md
The reusable operator prompt structure in docs/operations/OLARES-AI-DELEGATED-DUAL-LANE-OPERATOR-PROMPT-TEMPLATE-2026-05-13.md
The reusable coordinator closeout structure in docs/operations/OLARES-AI-DELEGATED-DUAL-LANE-COORDINATOR-CLOSEOUT-TEMPLATE-2026-05-13.md
The unchanged helper execution surface and focused truthfulness suite
constrained_outputs: One fresh Packet 834 admitted-trio live evidence tuple emitted through tools/ai/run_authoritative_host_packet.py under tests/canary/host-bootstrap-status/actual and tests/canary/mcp-contract/actual
One disjoint reusable delegated packet-definition template at docs/operations/OLARES-AI-DELEGATED-DUAL-LANE-PACKET-TEMPLATE-2026-05-13.md
One coordinator-owned closeout handoff for Packet 834 plus any needed PROJECT_STATUS.md routing update only after both lane validations and host parity restoration succeed
An explicit ABORTED closeout instead of partial success if lane ownership drifts, the helper surface requires mutation, or validation fails

lane_a.name: helper-driven live host evidence lane
allowed_actions: run the focused helper truthfulness pytest slice
publish only the Packet 834 artifact tuple emitted by the unchanged helper
forbidden_actions: changing auth, ingress, runtime posture, or business logic

lane_b.name: delegated packet template lane
allowed_actions: author one repo-owned reusable delegated packet-definition template for later packets
reuse Packet 831 as the delegated split-governance floor, Packet 832 as the delegated operator prompt template floor, and Packet 833 as the delegated coordinator closeout template floor
record the exact packet fields, lane ownership fields, coordinator shared-surface fields, and placeholder set needed for later delegated packet JSON authoring
forbidden_actions: editing live artifact files under tests/canary
changing auth, ingress, runtime posture, admitted services, or business logic

required_combined_checks: both lane-level validation tuples are present
the live helper result is PASS for Packet 834
the host returns to truthful not-running rest state
authoritative-host parity is restored without widening scope

execution_gate: Satisfied after Packet 833 publication and authoritative-host parity restoration on 2026-05-13.
publication_note: Lane A and Lane B validated cleanly, the Packet 834 closeout set was published, and authoritative-host parity was restored at the same clean head using only the bounded generated-artifact blocker remediation authorized by the delegated checklist.
